messages.subject: On-call rotation — formalizing for Q1
messages.body:
Marcus, Jordan, Liam,

Happy holidays. Keeping this brief.

After what Jordan went through Dec 23, we are not doing solo on-call again. Q1 needs a formal rotation — minimum two engineers in any on-call window.

Marcus — can you draft something for the Jan 6 all-hands?

— P

messages.subject: Re: On-call rotation — formalizing for Q1
messages.body:
Draft Q1 rotation:

Week 1 (Jan 5–11): Jordan primary, Liam backup
Week 2 (Jan 12–18): Liam primary, Marcus backup
Week 3 (Jan 19–25): Marcus primary, Jordan backup
Week 4 (Jan 26–Feb 1): Jordan primary, Liam backup
... repeat.

Rules:
- P1: Both primary and backup paged simultaneously if primary doesn't ack in 10 min
- No one is sole primary on company holidays — double staffing required
- Max 7 consecutive days on-call for anyone

Jordan — does this work for you?

-M

messages.subject: Re: On-call rotation — formalizing for Q1
messages.body:
This works. Thank you both — genuinely.

One ask: put the holiday rule in writing in the rotation doc, not just here in email. Dec 23 shouldn't be something someone has to rediscover.

— J
